title: Double-clicking session crashes app with ErrorBoundary
description: Double-clicking a session in the sidebar causes the app to crash with a React ErrorBoundary showing 'Something went wrong. An unexpected error occurred.' This is the same known issue where clicking existing conversations crashes the app.
steps_to_reproduce:
1. Navigate to http://localhost:1927
2. Double-click any session in the sidebar (e.g., 'Crispy Meadow')
3. App crashes with ErrorBoundary
expected: Double-click should either open the session or trigger inline rename
actual: App crashes with 'Something went wrong' error boundary
impact: BLOCKER - Cannot open any existing conversations. Blocks STORY-004 (Fork) in-conversation testing.

title: No right-click context menu on session items
description: Right-clicking on a session item in the sidebar does not show a context menu. Only the three-dot hover menu provides access to Rename/Fork/Export/Delete actions.
steps_to_reproduce:
1. Navigate to http://localhost:1927
2. Right-click on any session in the sidebar
3. Observe that only the browser's default context menu appears
expected: A custom context menu with Rename, Fork, Export, Delete options
actual: No custom context menu appears on right-click
impact: Low - the three-dot hover menu provides equivalent functionality
